title: Pufferfish's Biome Dither
description: Adds dithering on the biome borders to the game.
body:
# Pufferfish's Biome Dither

## About

Pufferfish's Biome Dither is a mod that aims to visually improve borders of biomes that use different surface blocks. Since biomes in vanilla have resolution of 4 blocks, they often result in blocky shaped borders. This mod prevents these artifacts by mixing blocks of the nearby biomes to create smooth transitions.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlybdB0E/images/51993b629cf2e559af5045cb20463b96aa8e9007.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlybdB0E/images/eb89bff9f53497476c590e37fbfd541adfe3c4ea.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlybdB0E/images/e6d54d4da9f23ec7a7ad0d32b243be6172fb642b.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlybdB0E/images/ced93034e5622d86b439b67a685374e52e926a65.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlybdB0E/images/c404fa2cfa5f40fb88804011d68722857dbf794b.png)

## Compatibility

Pufferfish's Biome Dither is compatible with custom biomes and world generation.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xlybdB0E/images/023cd0ca8b1d99f5e024c8e1b37e92bf3a01ecc3.png)
